race.comment: OCEAN CHILL (9) moved up nicely to lead in the lane but found a couple better late in the piece when resuming over 1300m at Kembla last start. Up slightly in grade but drops 3.5kgs after the claim and strips fitter. Sure to be there at the business end. COSMEENA (3) scored over 1200m here first-up but has been outclassed in two subsequent outings in Provincial Championship qualifiers. Back in her right grade today so give her another chance. BOLD AND BLAZEN (4) was never on the track so his failure in a Rosehill Midway last Saturday should be ignored. Form prior to that was good enough to make him highly competitive. ALFRED (7) is not the most reliable conveyance. Won here at this trip two back then found a BM78 a bit rich last start. Can feature in this easier contest if at his best.
